'''鈭歞h-j-dh-s''' ('''kadhajdhesoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:isotope|isotope]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-j-dh-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:isotope|isotope]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歞h-j-dh-s
|-
! Lemma
| kadhajdhesoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thidhajdhesoko|thidhajdhesoko]] || [[word:jidhajdhesoko|jidhajdhesoko]] || [[word:shidhajdhesoko|shidhajdhesoko]] || [[word:kidhajdhesoko|kidhajdhesoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thadhajdhesoko|thadhajdhesoko]] || [[word:jadhajdhesoko|jadhajdhesoko]] || [[word:shadhajdhesoko|shadhajdhesoko]] || [[word:kadhajdhesoko|kadhajdhesoko]]
|-

|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
